description: 历史研究写作结构标准 - 适用于 NHD (National History Day) 等历史竞赛

required_sections.name: Introduction / Hook
required_sections.description: 通过历史叙事吸引读者，引出论点

required_sections.name: Historical Context
required_sections.description: 构建历史背景与时代框架

required_sections.name: Thesis & Arguments
required_sections.description: 用一手史料支撑论点，分析多重历史视角

required_sections.name: Significance / Legacy
required_sections.description: 阐述历史事件的长远意义与当代连接

required_sections.name: Conclusion
required_sections.description: 总结核心论点，重申历史意义

required_sections.name: Annotated Bibliography
required_sections.description: 区分一手和二手史料，附注释说明每条史料如何支持论文
